/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/http/http_date.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/http/http_packet.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/http/http_req_handlers.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/http/http_req_parser.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/http/http_request_types.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/http/http_res_builder.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/http/http_res_dispatcher.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/http/http_router.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/networking/http_server.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/structures/d_string.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/structures/hash_map.c.o" "CMakeFiles/http-server.dir/src/utils/fs_utils.c.o" -o http-server
